items.title: Lenox Township takes first reading on I-94 Development District ordinance
items.dek: The Lenox Township Board will conduct the first reading of Section 719.58 creating an I-94 Development District at its July 13 meeting. Residents within 30 minutes should track how these rules shape future development on township land near the interstate.
items.findings: July 13 Board of Trustees agenda lists first reading of Section 719.58 I-94 Development District under new business | June 2 public notice posted proposed High Resource Demand Facilities Ordinance for public hearing | June 2 notice also covered Proposed I-94 Development District Ordinance public hearing
items.perspective: The first reading opens the formal legislative path for the I-94 district rules, with public comment available at the meeting and further readings expected before any final adoption.
